---
title: "PAAR*: GREEN"
mainfont: Special Elite
---

MISSION <br>
**G**REENLAND **R**ESEARCHERS **E**SCAPE WHILST YOU **E**SCORT **N**OGGIN 

**MISSION LOCATION** <br> 
█████████████████████████████, GREENLAND, BIWAYS

**MISSION STARTED - MISSION CLOSED** <br> 
1652, 19TH DEC 1989 - 0452, 20TH DEC 1989

**CLIENT - CONTRACT DATE** <br> 
UNIVERSITY OF CAMBRIDGE- 18TH DEC 1989

**REMARKS** <br> 
The last mission of the decade.
The 1990s is fast approaching with a hurley covered in obsidian shards to be rid of the 80s.
I was hoping the new decade would be more stable and less weird.
I just hope we can be a good change in this world.

A simple but tough job this one.
We were to transport an object called the HEAD* from a top secret research station in Greenland to Nuuk, the capital city.
They had been attacked multiple times and so were going to evacuate.
The researchers would evacuate by air whilst our team would transport the HEAD by ground during a break in the blizzard.

The following after action report the surviving members of the team.
It may seem preposterous, and if it was just from CRACKED BATFISH's recount I'd agree, but the whole team's debriefs match.
Get ready.

The team arrived at the research base with no issue.
Shenanigans immediately started at this point.
Each of my team was given a HEAD and told they had the real one in secret.
Thankfully they did tell TRUFFLE that he actually had the real one and the others had been lied to.
As the mission leader he played along seeing the logic and not wanting the demoralise the team.
The HEAD was far more valuable than Cambridge told me, I could have charged them more.
With their snowmobiles the team set off to Nuuk as the researchers evacuated in a few chinooks.

With a massive crack ringing through the air as the research base self destructed they headed to Nuuk.
They slid over the snow and ice encrusted ground with no troubles till the blizzard once again arrived, like an unwanted grenade landing in your dugout.
Though difficult TRUFFLE was able to sense the scent of fur, sweat, and steel through the blizzard. 
Normally it would be impossible for an enemy force to track anyone through the blizzard but they also had sharp noses on their side.
They were fucking Cyborg Polar Bears!
Not only that but they had side mounted heavy machine guns and riders.
These riders were also cyborg, their head gear attached to the cybertonics of the bears and they were equipped with stun sticks and Boyes anti-tank rifles.

The team attempted to outrun the two Cyborg Polar Bears but they are faster than snowmobiles seemingly.
With gunfire range fast approaching upon them SUBSONIC did something smart in theory but dumb in reality.
Believing he had the real HEAD he used his Kinetic transfer ability to increase the speed of his snowmobile and escape.
He was too fast for TRUFFLE's 2 warnings.
First that he didn't have the real HEAD.
Secondly that TRUFFLE had just sensed the presence of 2 more CYBORG POLAR BEARS laying in wait ahead.

At greater than 200mph SUBSONIC crashed into one of the hidden CYBORG POLAR BEARS killing it and causing him and the bear's rider to fly off.
This chased everything from a chase to a good old fashioned mounted combat.
As the other previously hidden Cyborg rised up TRUFFLE shot the rider with his Ishapore.
A few shots and he was dead.
This changed the Polar bear from a composed steed into a wild animal, connection to its rider broken.
It bore down on SUBSONIC and the unmounted cyborg rider.
The once-rider reached for his boyes rifle, shot, missed, and yelled in pain at his now even more broken shoulder.
His screams only stopped when the bear tore out his throat.
TRUFFLE raced as fast as he could but ultimately the dazed SUBSONIC became bear food.

All this whilst the other two, BATFISH and FLASHBANG, attempted to deal with the initial 2 Cyborg polar bears.
The bears got close enough to fire their HMGs with it sounding like hail on the roof against FLASHBANG's backmounted shield.
Thankfully, the riders didn't use their rifles, seemingly only able to concentrate on controlling their mounts.
KNowing they couldn't outrun the bears they decided to turn around and circle around them.
Harder for them to hit that way they effectively wasted their HMG ammo as their smaller firearms did little against the heavily armoured bears and riders.

With a stun grenade FLASHBANG dazzled one and always insane BATFISH jumped onto the bears back.
Grabbing the Boyes rifle off the rider he shot through through their back and into the head of the bear*.
With the force of the gun and death toss BATFISH flew off its back landing in a soft pile of snow.
Of course their was the other active cyborg bear who wasn't going to waste the opportunity to kill a mad wizard.
FLASHBANG to the rescue he just about reached BATFISH first and without stopping grabbed him on to his snowmobile with his right hand.
With his left arm he blocked a ferocious bite of the bear.
If it had been a normal arm the bear would have pulled him straight off his vehicle.
Instead the arm shattered.
With mouth full of blood and hematite the bear roared and FLASHBANG fled towards TRUFFLE.




on an intercept course
Although a blizzard reduces the range of TRUFFLE's Smell-nar it was still better than the other's visibility






Our mission 



**MERCENARIES INVOLVED - CODENAMES - STATUS** <br>
████████████████████ - SIGHTLESS TRUFFLE - ACTIVE <br>
████████████████████ - SUBSONIC HYDRA - KIA <br>
████████████████████ - FLASHBANG FIDDLER - ACTIVE <br>
████████████████████ - CRACKED BATFISH - ACTIVE <br>


\*Highly Expensive Ambulatory Device<br>
\*Pretty awesome I must admit

Other mission:
NOt sure if I should include the below as a mission I do think it would be good though

Pickup is in redacted research station, need to reach capital of Nuuk for handoff. 

SUBSONIC HYDRA (power to make anything they touch go extremely fast) crashes into a polar bear (their breaks didn't work because of BATFISH). HYDRA had the head though so they need to fight to get it back.

Following this an impromptu mission involving transporting a frozen head from Greenland to Cambridge. The team were assaulted by cyborg bears. Wolf crashed their snowmobile into one, but the team soon learnt to kill the riders instead. With the riders gone Truffle led the bears to elks, distracting one and Cracks used their wizardry to pacify the other. With little fanfare they made their delivery.

With a successful mission they watched what remained of the LAS-USA burn up on renentry with the background of an aurora.

\*PAAR is the acronym for PUML After Action Report <br>
